login.title: Ngena ngemvume
login.errorDefault: Ukungena ngemvume kwehlulekile. Sicela uhlole ulwazi lwakho.
login.socialLoginError: Ukungena ngemvume komphakathi kwehlulekile. Sicela uzame futhi.

register.title: Bhalisa
register.passwordTooShort: Iphasiwedi kumele okungenani ibe nezinhlamvu ezi-6 ubude.
register.registerSuccess: I-akhawunti yakho idalwe ngempumelelo! Uqondiswa kabusha ekhasini lokungena ngemvume...

forgotPassword.title: Ngikhohliwe iphasiwedi yami.
forgotPassword.description: Faka ikheli lakho le-imeyili bese sizokuthumelela isixhumanisi sokusetha kabusha iphasiwedi.
forgotPassword.successDescription: Isixhumanisi sokusetha kabusha iphasiwedi sithunyelwe ekhelini lakho le-imeyili. Sicela uhlole ibhokisi lakho lokungenayo.
forgotPassword.errorDefault: Kuvele iphutha. Sicela uhlole ikheli lakho le-imeyili.

resetPassword.title: Setha Iphasiwedi Entsha
resetPassword.successDescription: Iphasiwedi yakho ibuyekezwe ngempumelelo. Ungangena ngemvume ngephasiwedi yakho entsha.
resetPassword.invalidLinkDescription: Isixhumanisi sokusetha kabusha iphasiwedi asivumelekile noma asiphelele. Sicela uphinde uhlole isixhumanisi esiku-imeyili yakho.
resetPassword.passwordTooShort: Iphasiwedi kumele okungenani ibe nezinhlamvu ezi-6 ubude.
resetPassword.errorDefault: Ukusetha kabusha iphasiwedi kuhlulekile. Ukuxhumeka kungase kungasebenzi noma kuphelelwe yisikhathi.

dashboard.title: Ideshibhodi
dashboard.fetchError: Kuvele iphutha ngesikhathi kulayishwa idatha yephaneli.

profile.title: Ulwazi lwephrofayela
profile.description: Ungabuyekeza ulwazi lwakho lomuntu siqu lapha.

deleteDialog.title: Susa isikhangiso
deleteDialog.description: Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukususa lolu hlu? Lesi senzo asinakuguqulwa.

favorites.title: Izintandokazi zami
favorites.noFavorites: Awukangezi noma yimiphi imikhiqizo oyithandayo okwamanje.

messages.title: Imilayezo
messages.startConversation: Ukuze ubuze umbuzo mayelana nesikhangiso, iya esikhangisweni.
messages.deleteConfirm: Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukususa le ngxoxo?

updatePassword.title: Buyekeza Iphasiwedi
updatePassword.description: Buyekeza iphasiwedi yakho njalo ukuze kuvikelwe i-akhawunti yakho.
updatePassword.passwordTooShort: Iphasiwedi entsha kumele okungenani ibe nezinhlamvu ezi-6 ubude.
updatePassword.errorDefault: Iphasiwedi ayikwazanga ukubuyekezwa. Sicela uhlole iphasiwedi yakho yamanje.

preferences.title: Isaziso kanye Nezintandokazi Zokubuka
preferences.description: Phatha iziteshi zakho zezaziso kanye nezintandokazi zokubonisa.
preferences.emailNotificationsDesc: Thola izaziso ze-imeyili zemiyalezo emisha kanye nezibuyekezo zezikhangiso.
preferences.pushNotificationsDesc: Thola izaziso ze-push ukuze uthole izibuyekezo ezisheshayo.

deleteAccount.title: Susa i-Akhawunti
deleteAccount.description: Uma usususile i-akhawunti yakho, akusekho ukubuyela emuva. Yonke idatha yakho, uhlu, kanye nezingxoxo kuzosuswa unomphela.
deleteAccount.confirmTitle: Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukususa i-akhawunti yakho?
deleteAccount.warningProfile: Iphrofayela yakho kanye nolwazi lomuntu siqu
deleteAccount.error: Yehlulekile ukususa i-akhawunti. Sicela uhlole iphasiwedi yakho bese uzama futhi.

hero.title: Ipulatifomu Yokuhweba Ngezilwane Ebukhoma
hero.subtitle: Ipulatifomu yokuhweba ngezilwane eziphilayo ethembeke kakhulu. Thenga futhi uthengise izinkomo nezimvu zakho ngokuphephile.

secure.title: Ukuthenga Okuphephile
secure.description: Konke ukuthengiselana kuphephile. Ulwazi lomthengisi nomthengi seluqinisekisiwe.

variety.title: Ububanzi Bomkhiqizo
variety.description: Izinkomo, izimvu, nokuningi. Thola kalula isilwane osifunayo.

support.title: Usekelo lwango-24/7
support.description: Sihlala silapha ukuze sithole imibuzo yakho. Ulayini wethu wokusekela bukhoma uyasebenza.

cta.title: Qala Manje
cta.subtitle: Thatha indawo yakho epulatifomu lapho izinkulungwane zabathengisi nabathengi zihlangana khona.

footer.tagline: Ipulatifomu yokuhweba ngezilwane eziphilayo ethembeke kakhulu eTurkey.

faq.title: imibuzo ejwayelekile ukubuzwa
faq.description: Izimpendulo zemibuzo yakho evame ukubuzwa mayelana neplatifomu yethu.

about.title: Mayelana NATHI
about.subtitle: Ipulatifomu yokuhweba ngezilwane eziphilayo ethembeke kakhulu eTurkey.

mission.title: Umsebenzi Wethu
mission.description: Ngokwenza ukuhweba ngezilwane eziphilayo kube ngedijithali, sihlose ukudala isixhumanisi esiphephile, esisobala, nesisebenzayo phakathi kwabakhiqizi nabathengi.

vision.title: Umbono Wethu
vision.description: Ukuba yiphayona ekuguqulweni kwedijithali emkhakheni wezolimo nokuba yipulatifomu yomhlaba wonke yokuhweba ngezilwane eziphilayo.

trust.title: Ukwethemba
trust.description: Ukucaca nokuthembeka kubalulekile kuzo zonke izinkokhelo.

quality.title: Ikhwalithi
quality.description: Ukuthuthukiswa okuqhubekayo ukuze kuhlinzekwe isevisi engcono kakhulu.

form.title: Sibhalele
form.name: Igama lakho
form.subject: Isihloko
form.success: Umlayezo wakho uthunyelwe ngempumelelo. Sizobuyela kuwe ngokushesha okukhulu.
form.error: Kuvele iphutha ngesikhathi kuthunyelwa umlayezo. Sicela uzame futhi.

acceptance.title: 1. Ukwamukelwa Kwemigomo
acceptance.content: Ngokusebenzisa le webhusayithi, uyavumelana nemigomo yokusebenzisa elandelayo. Uma ungavumelani nale migomo, sicela ungasebenzisi isayithi.

services.title: 2. Izinsizakalo
services.content: I-Livestock Trading inikeza inkundla yokuthenga nokuthengisa izilwane eziphilayo. Konke ukuthengiselana kule nkundla kungumthwalo wemfanelo womsebenzisi.

accounts.title: 3. Ama-Akhawunti Omsebenzisi
accounts.content: Kumelwe unikeze ulwazi olunembile nolusesikhathini ukuze udale i-akhawunti. Ukuphepha kwe-akhawunti yakho kungumthwalo wakho wemfanelo.

prohibited.title: 4. Imisebenzi Engavunyelwe
prohibited.content: Izikhangiso ezidukisayo, ulwazi olungamanga, ukukhwabanisa, kanye nemisebenzi engekho emthethweni akuvunyelwe ngokuphelele.

liability.title: 5. Umkhawulo Wesibopho
liability.content: Ipulatifomu ayinawo umthwalo wemfanelo ngokuqondile ngokuthengiselana phakathi kwabasebenzisi. Konke ukuthengiselana kwenzeka phakathi kwamaqembu.

changes.title: 6. Izinguquko
changes.content: Le migomo nemibandela ingashintsha ngaphandle kwesaziso. Izinguquko zizoqala ukusebenza ngokushesha lapho kushicilelwa.

collection.title: 1. Ukuqoqwa Kolwazi
collection.content: Uma udala i-akhawunti, siqoqa ulwazi lomuntu siqu njengegama lakho, ikheli le-imeyili, kanye nenombolo yocingo. Singase futhi siqoqe idatha engaziwa mayelana nokusebenzisa kwakho isayithi.

usage.title: 2. Ukusetshenziswa Kolwazi
usage.content: Ulwazi esiluqoqayo lusetshenziselwa ukuhlinzeka ngezinsizakalo zethu, ukuphatha i-akhawunti yakho, ukuqinisekisa ukuphepha, kanye nokukunikeza okunikezwayo okwenzelwe wena.

sharing.title: 3. Ukwabelana Ngolwazi
sharing.content: Ulwazi lwakho lomuntu siqu ngeke luthengiswe noma luqashiswe kubantu besithathu. Ulwazi lwakho ngeke lwabelwane ngaphandle kwezinjongo ezidingekayo ngokomthetho.

security.title: 4. Ukuphepha
security.content: Izindlela zokuphepha ezijwayelekile zemboni zikhona ukuvikela idatha yakho.

cookies.title: 5. Amakhukhi
cookies.content: Iwebhusayithi yethu isebenzisa amakhukhi ukuthuthukisa ulwazi lomsebenzisi. Ungaphatha izintandokazi zakho zamakhukhi kuzilungiselelo zesiphequluli sakho.

rights.title: 6. Amalungelo Akho
rights.content: Ngaphansi koMthetho Wokuvikelwa Kwedatha Yomuntu Siqu waseTurkey (KVKK), unelungelo lokufinyelela, ukulungisa, nokususa idatha yakho yomuntu siqu.

products.title: Imikhiqizo
products.showing: Isamba semikhiqizo engu-{total} phakathi kuka-{from} no-{to}.

productDetail.loginRequired: Sicela ungene ngemvume ukuze wenze lesi senzo.

healthRecords.description: Phatha amarekhodi ezempilo yezilwane kanye nomlando wezokwelapha.

shippingCarriers.noCarriers: Akukho nkampani yokuthumela impahla engeziwe okwamanje.
shippingCarriers.saveError: Kuvele iphutha ngesikhathi kubhaliswa inkampani yokuthumela.

shippingCarriers.fetchError: Kuvele iphutha ngesikhathi kulayishwa izinkampani zemithwalo.

shippingRates.title: Imali Yokuthumela
shippingRates.description: Phatha izindleko zokuthumela kanye nezinketho zokulethwa.

subscription.title: Izinhlelo Zokubhalisa
subscription.cancelConfirmTitle: Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukukhansela okubhalisele kwakho?
subscription.cancelConfirmDescription: Okubhalisele kwakho kuzohlala kusebenza kuze kube sekupheleni kwesikhathi. Ngemva kokuphelelwa yisikhathi, uzothuthelwa ohlelweni lwamahhala.
subscription.noSubscriptionDesc: Ngohlelo lwamahhala, ungashicilela uhlu olufika ku-3. Thuthukisa uhlelo lwakho ukuze uthole okwengeziwe.
subscription.subscriptionExpired: Okubhalisele kwakho sekuphelelwe yisikhathi. Chofoza ukuze uvuselele.
subscription.subscriptionCancelled: Okubhalisele kwakho kukhanseliwe. Kusebenza kuze kube yilapho kuphelelwa yisikhathi.

metadata.title: Ukuhweba Ngezilwane - Ipulatifomu Yokuhweba Ngezilwane Eziphilayo
metadata.description: Ipulatifomu yokuhweba ngezilwane ebukhoma ethembeke kakhulu emhlabeni. Ukuthenga nokuthengisa izilwane okuphephile nokusobala.

about.title: Mayelana NATHI
about.description: Funda ngokuhwebelana ngezilwane. Ipulatifomu yokuhweba ngezilwane eziphilayo ethembekile.

contact.title: Ukuxhumana
contact.description: Xhumana nathi. Ithimba lokusekela amakhasimende le-Livestock Trading likulungele ukukusiza.

privacy.title: Inqubomgomo yobumfihlo
privacy.description: Inqubomgomo yobumfihlo yokuhweba ngezilwane. Funda ukuthi idatha yakho yomuntu siqu ivikelwe kanjani.

products.title: Imikhiqizo
products.description: Dlulisa amehlo ohlwini lwezilwane ezibukhoma. Izikhangiso ezithembekile zezinkomo, izimvu, nokuningi.

sellers.title: Abathengisi
sellers.description: Thola abathengisi bezilwane abathembekile. Amaphrofayili omthengisi aqinisekisiwe kanye nokubuyekezwa.

transporters.title: abathuthi
transporters.description: Thola izinkampani zokuthutha izilwane. Ukuthuthwa kwezilwane eziphilayo okuphephile nobungcweti.

search.title: Sesha
search.description: Sesha phakathi kohlu lwezilwane ezibukhoma. Ukusesha okulula ngezinketho zokuhlunga nokuhlunga.

faq.title: imibuzo ejwayelekile ukubuzwa
faq.description: Imibuzo nezimpendulo ezivame ukubuzwa mayelana nokuhweba ngemfuyo.

productDetail.title: {isihloko} - Kuthengiswa
productDetail.description: Kuthengiswa ku-{title} - {city}. Chofoza ukuze uthole imininingwane kanye nolwazi lokuxhumana.

sellerDetail.title: {igama} - Iphrofayela Yomthengisi
sellerDetail.description: Iphrofayela yomthengisi ka-{name}. Izibuyekezo, uhlu, kanye nolwazi lokuxhumana.

transporterDetail.title: {igama} - Iphrofayela Yenkampani Yenethiwekhi
transporterDetail.description: Iphrofayela yomthuthi ka-{name}. Izindawo zesevisi, ukubuyekezwa, kanye nolwazi lokuxhumana.

boost.title: I-Boost
boost.noBoostsDesc: Thenga iphakheji ye-boost ukuze ubonise imikhiqizo yakho.
boost.listingLimitReached: Usufinyelele umkhawulo wakho wokufakwa ohlwini. Thuthukisa uhlelo lwakho.

admin.title: Iphaneli Yokuphatha
admin.subscriptionPlansDescription: Phatha izinhlelo zokubhalisela, amanani, kanye nezici.
admin.boostPackagesDescription: Phatha amaphakheji e-boost, amanani, kanye nezilungiselelo zobude besikhathi.
admin.editPlanDescription: Buyekeza imininingwane yohlelo, amanani, imikhawulo, kanye nezici.
admin.editPackageDescription: Buyekeza imininingwane yephakheji, amanani, kanye nezilungiselelo ze-boost.
admin.exchangeRatesDescription: Buka wonke amazinga okushintshaniswa kwemali kanye nesimo sawo sokubuyekeza.
admin.exchangeRateInfo: Amanani okushintshaniswa kwemali abuyekezwa ngokuzenzakalelayo njalo emahoreni ayi-6 ngomsebenzi we-Hangfire.

pricing.approximatePrice: Ukuguqulwa okulinganiselwe okusekelwe kumanani okushintshanisa amanje
